args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE OrderId IN (SELECT Id FROM "Order" WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '#', '')) ) LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE OrderId IN (SELECT Id FROM "Order" WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '#', '')) ) LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '#', '')) AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '#', '')) AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

args.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU' LIMIT 10;
